name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly changes the data cleaning approach (adding new features, encoding categorical variables), shifts the modeling strategy from regression to classification for stability, changes the definition of mechanical viability, and alters the final integration/reporting logic (Pareto dominance vs. weighted scoring). Because the core data processing and modeling objectives have fundamentally changed, the previous execution results are not directly reusable for the new workflow.
